name: Can my employer make me see their doctor for my work illness in Utah?
description: Yes for IME, but get your own doctor too.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can my employer make me see their doctor for my work illness in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for IME, but get your own doctor too.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, they can require an IME, but the doctor owes no treatment duty to you.[1] Utah Supreme Court limits IME liability.[1] Key factors: (1) attend or risk denial; (2) record inconsistencies; (3) get your own eval. Prepare questions, bring records. Dispute biased reports via appeal. Your rights protected.
